unchanged_dependencies: ui/src/routes/QueryView.tsx, GraphView.tsx, FilesAdminView.tsx (relative fetch paths, unmodified)

risk_areas.area: nginx path collision between SPA client route /query (GET) and API route /query (POST)
risk_areas.mitigation: if-GET-rewrite-to-index.html inside location /query, else proxy POST to api; documented in architecture-discovery.md

risk_areas.area: agents container crash-exits without LLM_PROVIDER before health check binds
risk_areas.mitigation: compose environment sets LLM_PROVIDER=${LLM_PROVIDER:-ollama} default, carried over from 6.2.1 finding

risk_areas.area: docker compose up first-run race (dependent services starting before engine/api are healthy)
risk_areas.mitigation: depends_on with condition: service_healthy (Compose v2 feature, confirmed v2.34.0 installed)

risk_areas.area: ui build (tsc -b, strict mode) failing inside Docker build stage
risk_areas.mitigation: run actual `docker compose build ui` / `docker compose up` in step 3 to confirm real build success, not just static review

risk_areas.area: missing deploy/.env should not break docker compose up
risk_areas.mitigation: use ${VAR:-default} substitution syntax, not env_file: directive (which errors on missing file)

no_impact_on: engine/, api/, agents/ source code (no changes)
existing api/routes/query.go handlers (untouched, only consumed via reverse proxy)
subtask 6.2.3 (real deploy target, separately blocked, untouched)
